emails.subject: Re: FW: FORM: BILATERAL CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT
emails.body: Re: FW: FORM: BILATERAL CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT Phil, Please let them know that all of their proposed changes are acceptable. Let me know if they are going to create original and bring it down signed or do they intend to do something else. Phil DeMoes/ENRON@enronXgate 05/30/2001 07:55 AM
